<!-- Thanks for contributing to Kredex! Please fill this out so reviews go quickly. -->

## What & why

Describe what this PR changes and the reason for it.

Closes #<!-- issue number, if any -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## How to test

Steps for a reviewer to verify the change (commands, what to click, expected result).

## Checklist

- [ ] I opened/linked an issue for anything non-trivial
- [ ] Backend type-checks: `npm --prefix server run build`
- [ ] Client type-checks: `npm --prefix client run typecheck`
- [ ] I matched the style of the surrounding code
- [ ] I added/updated docs where relevant
- [ ] Screenshots or a clip are attached (for UI changes)
